home.enterWorkState: 100% Browser Local Sandbox Running · Zero Network Upload
home.description: Before sharing PDF, Word, Excel, or image files online, deeply scan and clean hidden author names, company info, local development absolute paths, revision histories (RSID), and media EXIF details. Everything runs locally in your browser sandbox.
home.moreComing: We promise to never access your document content. All operations are performed 100% safely within your local browser sandbox.
home.solutionSectionDesc: For common document formats shared and submitted online, MetaDocu provides professional browser-local metadata sanitization solutions, targeting key sensitive properties and rebuilding file binary structures safely.
home.dragUploadStart: Drag & drop files here to audit privacy
home.singleOrBatchDesc: Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, JPG, PNG. Directly drag files in to get a detailed privacy report instantly.
home.seoSectionTitle: The First 100% Browser-Local Metadata Privacy Audit Tool
home.seoSectionDesc: MetaDocu is a professional browser-local metadata privacy scanner and cleanup utility. Unlike standard online metadata editors, MetaDocu does not require uploading any of your files to a remote server. All complex operations, including Office XML tree reconstruction, PDF Xref offset recalculation, RSID paragraph tag stripping, and embedded image EXIF purging, are executed safely in your local browser sandbox.
home.featureWordDesc: Instantly scan and strip creator, manager, company name, and last modified by. Clean random revision histories (RSID) embedded within paragraphs, and recursively strip camera EXIF data from nested media images.
home.featureExcelDesc: Scan PDF files to detect digital signatures (warning triggered) to prevent file hash corruption. Gracefully capture password-protected PDFs for local decryption, and physically rebuild the PDF layout with Xref recalculation.
home.featurePdfDesc: Scan and physically wipe camera metadata, capture timestamp, and geographic GPS coordinates from JPEG/PNG images. Retain perfect image resolution while removing all metadata footprints.

faqItems.q: Are my files uploaded to your server?
faqItems.a: Absolutely not. MetaDocu is 100% browser-local. The metadata scanning and cleaning processes run entirely within your local WebAssembly sandbox. Your files never leave your device.

faqItems.q: What metadata privacy risks can this tool detect?
faqItems.a: It deeply parses and strips over 20 sensitive items, including creator name, last modified by, creation/modification times, local development template absolute paths, software versions, paragraph RSIDs, and image GPS locations.

faqItems.q: How do I check PDF metadata without uploading?
faqItems.a: Simply drag and drop your PDF into the upload zone. The local WebAssembly engine parses the document's Info dictionary in browser memory, listing all properties on your screen with zero network transfer.

faqItems.q: Can Word documents reveal comments or revision history?
faqItems.a: Yes. Word documents record random paragraph RSID markers that trace revision histories and editor footprints. MetaDocu purges these internal XML nodes cleanly, restoring privacy.

Yes. Traditional online metadata utilities require uploading contracts, resumes, or financial spreadsheets to their servers, inviting leakages. MetaDocu performs a strict client-side sandbox cleanup, locking down your data.
Yes. Smart phones and digital cameras record capture parameters and GPS locations into EXIF segments. MetaDocu performs a physical byte-strip of EXIF chunks, outputting clean images.

faqQuestions.edit-word-author: How to edit the author information of a Word document online?
faqQuestions.office-metadata-info: What information is included in Office document metadata?
faqQuestions.edit-pdf-properties: Can PDF file properties be edited?
faqQuestions.batch-clear-metadata: How to batch clear metadata from multiple documents?
faqQuestions.online-metadata-security: Is it safe to edit document metadata online?
faqQuestions.view-word-metadata: Where can I view the metadata of a Word document?
faqQuestions.modify-word-detectable: Can others tell if Word document properties have been modified?
faqQuestions.remove-word-privacy: How to completely delete personal privacy information in a Word document?
faqQuestions.excel-metadata-info: What information is included in Excel workbook metadata?
faqQuestions.pdf-metadata-location: Where is PDF file metadata stored?
faqQuestions.word-to-pdf-metadata: Will metadata be preserved after converting Word to PDF?
faqQuestions.word-hidden-metadata: What hidden metadata is in a Word document?
faqQuestions.delete-properties-visible: Can others still see the properties after deleting them?
faqQuestions.batch-delete-word-privacy: How to batch delete privacy information from multiple Word documents?
faqQuestions.batch-edit-excel-properties: How to batch edit the properties of multiple Excel files?
faqQuestions.excel-formula-impact: Will Excel formulas and charts be affected after modifying properties?
faqQuestions.clear-pdf-hidden-info: How to completely clear all hidden information in a PDF?
faqQuestions.online-pdf-upload: Do I need to upload files to edit PDF properties online?

faqAnswers.edit-word-author: Open the MetaDocu Privacy Scanner, upload your Word document, locate the author field in the scanner report interface, clean or modify it, and save. The entire process is done locally in your browser — your document is never uploaded to any server.
faqAnswers.office-metadata-info: Metadata includes author name, creation time, modification time, company name, title, subject, tags, notes, and more. This information may inadvertently leak your personal or company privacy.
faqAnswers.edit-pdf-properties: Yes. Upload a PDF file through the MetaDocu Privacy Scanner to detect and clean properties such as title, author, and subject. All processing is done locally in your browser, safe and convenient.
faqAnswers.batch-clear-metadata: Open the Batch Workspace, add multiple files, and use the batch clear feature to remove metadata from all files in one click. Supports mixed batch processing of Word, Excel, and PDF files.
faqAnswers.online-metadata-security: It is very safe. This tool processes everything locally in your browser. Your files are never uploaded to any server — all operations are completed on your device, fully protecting your data privacy.
faqAnswers.view-word-metadata: In Word, go to File → Info → Properties → Advanced Properties to view complete metadata, including author, revision count, editing time, and other hidden data.
faqAnswers.modify-word-detectable: This tool removes or overwrites common document metadata fields. However, some hidden information may still exist depending on the file format, editing history, embedded objects, PDF structure, or operating system metadata. We recommend using the after-clean verification report before sharing sensitive files.
faqAnswers.remove-word-privacy: Upload your Word document to the editor, clear all personal fields (author, company, notes, etc.) in the metadata editing area, save, and download. It is also recommended to check custom properties in the document properties panel.
faqAnswers.excel-metadata-info: Excel workbook metadata includes author, creation date, modification date, company name, title, subject, category, and more. This information travels with the file and may leak sensitive information.
faqAnswers.pdf-metadata-location: PDF metadata is stored in the document information dictionary (Info Dictionary) in the PDF header, including standard fields such as title, author, subject, keywords, creation date, and modification date.
faqAnswers.word-to-pdf-metadata: Possibly. When converting DOCX to PDF, some metadata (such as original creator and company name) may be transferred to the PDF property fields. It is recommended to clear sensitive information before conversion or use the PDF metadata editor.
faqAnswers.word-hidden-metadata: In addition to document properties like author and title, Word documents may also contain revision marks, comment history, hidden text, document version information, printer paths, and other less obvious metadata.
faqAnswers.delete-properties-visible: After thorough removal with this tool, others cannot see the information. The tool removes the relevant fields from the document's internal XML structure rather than simply hiding them in the UI, ensuring the information is permanently deleted.
faqAnswers.batch-delete-word-privacy: Use the Batch Workspace to add multiple Word documents at once, select the batch clear metadata feature, and process all files simultaneously in one click, greatly improving efficiency.
faqAnswers.batch-edit-excel-properties: Through the batch processing feature, import multiple Excel files at once and edit or clear property information uniformly. Supports batch setting of common fields such as author and company.
faqAnswers.excel-formula-impact: No. Metadata editing only affects document property information (such as author, title, etc.) and does not touch the data, formulas, charts, or formatting within the workbook.
faqAnswers.clear-pdf-hidden-info: Upload your PDF file, clear all property fields in the editor, save and download. The tool uses the pdf-lib library to directly manipulate the PDF structure, ensuring information is completely removed.
faqAnswers.online-pdf-upload: No upload to any server is required. This tool runs locally in your browser, using web technologies to process PDF files directly on the client — your files remain on your device at all times.

footer.contactDesc: Have questions or feedback? Reach out to us.

about.metaDescription: Learn about MetaDocu — a free, 100% browser-local privacy metadata scanner for PDF, Word, Excel, and image files. No uploads, no servers, total privacy.
about.heroSubtitle: Protecting Document Privacy with Browser-Local Technology
about.missionContent:
Every day, millions of business contracts, resumes, and confidential documents are shared online carrying hidden metadata — author names, company details, local file paths, GPS coordinates in embedded images, and revision histories that silently expose private information.

MetaDocu was built with a singular conviction: privacy-sensitive document processing should never require uploading your files to anyone's server. We deliver a complete metadata audit and cleaning toolkit that runs entirely inside your browser's WebAssembly sandbox.
about.techContent:
MetaDocu uses cutting-edge WebAssembly technology to process documents directly in your browser. When you load a file, it stays in your device's local memory — no network requests, no cloud storage, no server-side processing whatsoever.

Our engine reconstructs Office XML trees, recalculates PDF cross-reference tables, strips paragraph-level RSID revision markers, and recursively purges embedded EXIF/GPS data from nested images — all within milliseconds, right on your machine.

whyItems.title: Zero Upload, Zero Risk
whyItems.desc: Your files never leave your device. There is no server to breach, no cloud storage to compromise, and no network transfer to intercept.

whyItems.title: Deep Metadata Stripping
whyItems.desc: We don't just clear surface-level properties. MetaDocu performs byte-level sanitization of XML nodes, RSID markers, EXIF chunks, and PDF Info dictionaries.

whyItems.title: Professional & Free
whyItems.desc: Enterprise-grade metadata auditing available to everyone at no cost. No accounts, no subscriptions, no limitations.

whyItems.title: Multi-Format Support
whyItems.desc: Process Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx), PDF, JPEG, and PNG files with specialized engines built for each format.

about.contactContent: For questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries, reach us at:

privacy.metaDescription: MetaDocu Privacy Policy — Learn how we protect your data. 100% browser-local processing, zero file uploads, zero tracking of document content.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: MetaDocu ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our website and services at metadocu.com.

sections.heading: 2. Core Privacy Principle: 100% Local Processing
sections.content: MetaDocu is architecturally designed so that your documents are NEVER uploaded to any server. All file parsing, metadata scanning, editing, and cleaning operations are executed entirely within your browser's local WebAssembly sandbox. We have no server-side file storage infrastructure and no mechanism to access, read, or transmit your document content.

sections.heading: 3. Information We Collect
sections.content: We do NOT collect, store, or process any of your document files or their content. The only information we may collect includes: (a) basic website analytics via Google Analytics (page views, browser type, approximate geographic region) to improve our service; (b) a locale preference cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) to remember your language selection.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
sections.content: We use a minimal set of cookies: (a) NEXT_LOCALE — stores your preferred language (en or zh-CN), valid for 1 year; (b) Google Analytics cookies — used for anonymous traffic analysis. You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We use Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager to understand website traffic patterns. These services may collect anonymized usage data. We do not share any personal or document-related information with third parties.

sections.heading: 6. Data Security
sections.content: Since your files never leave your device, the risk of data breach through our service is fundamentally eliminated. Your documents exist only in your browser's local memory during processing and are discarded when you close the page or clear the session.

sections.heading: 7. Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our service is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 9. User-Uploaded Content & Infringement Exemption
sections.content: Because our tools operate 100% locally within your browser using WebAssembly technology, we do not upload, transmit, or store any file content on our servers. As a result, we have no physical control over, access to, or ability to inspect or block the content you process. You must ensure you have lawful rights and authorizations for all processed content. MetaDocu explicitly disclaims any and all liability for third-party intellectual property or copyright infringements arising from files processed or shared by users.

sections.heading: 10. Contact Us
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at mingicelucky@gmail.com.

terms.metaDescription: MetaDocu Terms of Service — Understand the terms governing use of our free, browser-local document metadata scanner and editor.
terms.title: Terms of Service

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using MetaDocu (metadocu.com), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

sections.heading: 2. Service Description
sections.content: MetaDocu provides a free, browser-based document metadata scanning, editing, and cleaning tool. All file processing occurs locally in your browser using WebAssembly technology. We do not provide server-side file storage or processing.

sections.heading: 3. User Responsibilities & Warranties
sections.content: You represent, warrant, and agree that you are solely responsible for: (a) all files and content you choose to process using our tool; (b) ensuring you possess all necessary legal rights, licenses, and permissions to modify the metadata of and process any documents; (c) ensuring that the documents you process do not violate any third-party copyrights, trademarks, patents, trade secrets, or any other proprietary or legal rights; (d) maintaining secure backups of your original files before using the tool. You agree to bear all legal, civil, and criminal liabilities, and fully indemnify MetaDocu and its creators for any third-party claims or lawsuits resulting from your processing, transmission, or distribution of unauthorized, illegal, or infringing content.

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content, design, code, and branding of MetaDocu are the intellectual property of MetaDocu. You retain full ownership of all documents you process through our tool. We claim no rights over your files or their content.

sections.heading: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: METADOCU AND ITS CREATORS PROVIDE THE SERVICE "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE," WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, SECURITY, OR ACCURACY. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, COMPLETELY ERROR-FREE, OR OF ANY ASSURED QUALITY, OR THAT ALL METADATA TRACES WILL BE SUCCESSFULLY OR COMPLETELY STRIPPED OR SANITIZED FROM EVERY DOCUMENT. YOUR USE OF THIS SERVICE IS ENTIRELY AT YOUR OWN SOLE RISK AND DISCRETION.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL METADOCU OR ITS DEVELOPERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, EXEMPLARY, PUNITIVE, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES OF ANY KIND (INCLUDING, WITHOUT LIMITATION, DAMAGES FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, BUSINESS INTERRUPTION, LOSS OF BUSINESS INFORMATION, LOSS OF DATA, FILE CORRUPTION, OR PRIVACY BREACHES ARISING FROM INCOMPLETE METADATA STRIPPING), EVEN IF WE HAVE BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY OF METADOCU OR ITS DEVELOPERS EXCEED ZERO DOLLARS ($0.00).

sections.heading: 7. Modifications to Service
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time without prior notice. We are not liable for any modification, suspension, or discontinuation.

sections.heading: 8. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws, without regard to conflict of law principles.

sections.heading: 9. Complete Intellectual Property Infringement Disclaimer & Indemnification
sections.content: MetaDocu provides an offline, client-side, browser-local utility. We do not host, check, or control the documents you import. You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless MetaDocu and its creators from and against any and all claims, liabilities, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or in any way connected with your violation of any third-party intellectual property rights (including copyrights, trademarks, patents, or trade secrets) through your use of this tool. Your use of this tool to process any infringing, unauthorized, or illegal material is entirely at your own risk.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at mingicelucky@gmail.com.
